questions.question: Before filling a jar with achaar, what do you make sure of about the jar and spoon?
sounds_right: bilkul sookha hona chahiye, paani ki ek boond bhi fungus laati hai
dho ke dhoop mein sukhati hoon, geela chammach kabhi nahi daalti
sounds_confused: bas saaf hona chahiye, dhone ke baad turant bhar do
jar ka kya hai, achaar toh masale se banta hai

questions.question: After washing the raw mango pieces, what do you do before they meet the salt and masala?
sounds_right: kapde pe phaila ke poora sukhaati hoon, chhoo ke dekho sookha lage
ponch ke hawa mein sukhana zaroori hai, geele tukde kharab karte hain
sounds_confused: dho ke seedha masala laga do, taaza rehta hai
thoda paani rahe toh chalta hai, namak sab sambhal lega

questions.question: Why is salt so important in achaar, beyond the taste?
sounds_right: namak sabzi ka paani nikaal deta hai, isi se achaar kharab nahi hota
namak hi bachata hai -- kam namak wala achaar jaldi sad jata hai
sounds_confused: namak sirf swad ke liye hai, kam bhi chalega
zyada namak sehat ke liye bura hai isliye kam daalo

questions.question: When you look at a filled pickle jar, how do you know the oil is enough?
sounds_right: upar tel ki parat dikhni chahiye, koi tukda bahar na jhaanke
tel sab ke upar khada ho -- jo tukda tel se bahar hai wahin fungus lagti hai
sounds_confused: tel toh swad ke liye hai, thoda bhi chalega
tel neeche baith jata hai, koi baat nahi

questions.question: What does keeping the jar in the sun for those first days actually do?
sounds_right: dhoop se tukde galte hain, rang gehra hota hai, aur kharabi nahi lagti
roz hilana aur dhoop dikhana -- isi se achaar pakta hai
sounds_confused: dhoop ka koi kaam nahi, andar rakho toh bhi wahi hai
dhoop mein rakhne se achaar sookh jata hai, nahi rakhna chahiye

questions.question: While the jar is sun-curing, what do you do with it each day?
sounds_right: sookhe chammach se hilao ya jar ghumao, shaam ko andar le aao
roz ek baar mila deti hoon taaki namak masala sab jagah lage
sounds_confused: bas rakh do aur bhool jao, khud ban jayega

questions.question: How would you know a jar of pickle has gone bad, and what would you do with it?
sounds_right: safed ya hari fafundi, ajeeb khatti badbu, ya bulbule -- wo jar phek do, bechna toh door
fuzz dikhe ya smell kharab ho toh chakhna bhi nahi, poora hatao aur bartan garam paani se dho lo
sounds_confused: upar se fafundi hata ke neeche ka use kar lo
thoda kharab smell toh achaar mein hota hi hai

questions.question: What kind of container do you store pickle in for the long months?
sounds_right: kaanch ya cheeni-mitti ki barni, plastic mein tel wala achaar nahi
glass jar, aur dhakkan ke neeche kapda ya kagaz taaki metal na chhue
sounds_confused: koi bhi dabba chalega, plastic sabse aasan hai
steel ke dabbe mein seedha bhar do

questions.question: If you made your first sellable batch, how would you pack and offer it?
sounds_right: chhote 200 gram ke jar, naam aur date ka sticker, aur chakhne ko ek chammach
pehle chhota jar sasta rakho taaki log try karein, phir bada khud maangte hain
sounds_confused: bade dabbe mein bharo, zyada bikta hai
packing ka kya, thaili mein de do
